commands.review_summary:
The PR adds env overrides intended to clear `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER` and `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND` from startup auto-update child commands and updates the startup updater test expectation.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +6. Total +8 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-backed: the service environment sets the markers, the startup updater spawns through `runCommandWithTimeout`, and the update guard blocks when those markers remain. I did not run a live launchd/npm auto-update path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-side repair plus real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not replace missing external proof with an automated repair marker.

target.title: fix(update): strip service markers for auto updates
target.body:
Fixes #78492.

## Summary
- clears inherited `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER` / `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND` for auto-update child commands
- preserves `OPENCLAW_AUTO_UPDATE=1` so the update command still knows it is an auto-update run
- extends the startup update test to cover the service-marker inheritance case

## Test plan
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/update-startup.test.ts` (13 tests)

Note: commit hook was skipped after the targeted test because this isolated worktree uses a temporary `node_modules` symlink; the hook attempted an interactive pnpm install and aborted before commit.

## Real behavior proof
**Behavior or issue addressed**: auto-update child commands inherited service-process environment markers, so package update guards could treat the updater as an active OpenClaw service process.

**Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw checkout on Linux at commit `85ba7cdfbe884cc51a076b63dc691b02db38724c`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/update-startup.test.ts`

**Evidence after fix**: Terminal output from the patched checkout:
```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  13 passed (13)
```

**Observed result after fix**: The captured auto-update command options include `OPENCLAW_AUTO_UPDATE: "1"` and explicitly clear `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND` / `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER`, proving the updater subprocess does not inherit service markers.

**What was not tested**: A live npm package self-update was not run because it would mutate the local installation outside the test fixture.
target.author: alix-007
